- Did the payment fail or get declined?
- Was an amount deducted but the purchase didn't complete?

issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove an interviewer from the platform, you need to lock their user access. Go to your profile icon in the top-right corner, select **Teams Management**, navigate to the **Users** tab, select the user you want to remove, click **More**, and then select **Lock**. You'll need to transfer their resource ownership to another user before confirming. Note that you must have Team Admin or Company Admin access to perform this action.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: I understand you'd like to pause your subscription due to halted hiring efforts. However, the pause subscription feature is only available for individual self-serve monthly plans (Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly) that have been active for at least 30 days. This feature is not available for team or enterprise subscriptions. If you have a team subscription, you may want to consider downgrading or canceling instead. Could you please confirm what type of subscription plan you currently have so I can provide more specific guidance?

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: Yes, you can update the name on your certificate. Go to your certificate page, enter the correct name in the Full Name field, and click Regenerate Certificate, then confirm by clicking Update Name. Please note that you can only update your name once per account, and the change will apply to all your certificates.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response:
To dispute a charge on your Visa card, follow these steps:

1. Contact your card issuer (the bank that issued your card) to question the charge on your billing statement.
2. Your issuer will then contact the merchant's bank (acquirer) for an accurate copy of the transaction record.
3. The merchant will be asked to provide documentation to support the transaction.

Visa has an efficient dispute resolution process to handle these situations. For more detailed information about the dispute process and guidelines, you can download the dispute guidelines from Visa's merchant resources.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: Thank you for reporting a security vulnerability in Claude. Please review our Responsible Disclosure Policy at https://www.anthropic.com/responsible-disclosure-policy, which includes a section on how to submit a report. For security vulnerabilities in our systems, this is the appropriate channel. If you've found a universal jailbreak related to biological threats specifically, you can also submit it through our Model Safety Bug Bounty Program on HackerOne, which offers rewards up to $35,000 for novel findings.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
To stop Claude from crawling your website, add the following to your robots.txt file in your top-level directory:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

You'll need to do this for every subdomain you want to opt out. If you have questions or believe the crawler is malfunctioning, contact claudebot@anthropic.com from an email that includes your domain.

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response:
To remove an employee who has left from your HackerRank hiring account, you should lock their user access. Here's how:

1. Log in to HackerRank for Work and select your profile icon in the upper-right corner
2. Select "Teams Management" from the drop-down menu
3. Go to the "Users" tab
4. Select the user you want to remove
5. Click "More" and select "Lock"
6. In the Lock Users dialog, select a user to transfer resource ownership to, then click "Confirm"

The user will be locked and unable to access the platform, but their account remains available for reuse if needed in the future.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response:
To set up Claude LTI for your students in Canvas, you'll need to follow these steps as an administrator:

1. Create a Claude LTI Developer Key in Canvas (Admin -> Developer Keys), configuring the redirect URIs, target link URI, and OpenID Connect initiation URL with the Claude endpoints
2. Install Claude LTI as an App in Canvas using the generated Client ID
3. Enable the Canvas integration in your Claude for Education organization settings (Organization settings > Connectors), entering your Canvas Domain, Client ID, and Deployment ID

If you have questions about your Claude for Education plan account or the LTI setup, please contact your university's administrator(s) for assistance.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
justification: Pre-submission verification detected a hallucinated factual claim contradicting the cited doc (data/visa/support.md). Response asserted a $10 minimum in US Virgin Islands violates Visa rules; cited doc explicitly names US Virgin Islands as an exception territory where the $10 minimum is permitted. Manually escalated rather than ship misinformation.
